title: Qualifications of Electors

content.text: Every person shall be entitled to be registered as an elector in one electoral district if, and shall not be entitled to be so registered unless, he or she is a Caymanian, has attained the age of eighteen years, is resident in the Cayman Islands, and has been resident in the Cayman Islands for a period or periods amounting to not less than two years out of the four years immediately preceding the date of registration.

notes: Elector eligibility: Caymanian, age 18, resident 2 of last 4 years.
